This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-68xw-r643-9p5w. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.5.6 contains a hook bypass vulnerability where skill commands routed through the affected dispatch path skip before-tool-call hook coverage. Attackers can exploit this by sending skill commands through the vulnerable dispatch path to bypass hook-based auditing and policy enforcement mechanisms.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-r7vv-6763-m739", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T20:15:49Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r7vv-6763-m739", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-r7vv-6763-m739"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-16T19:17:01Z", "published_at": "2026-06-16T21:31:58Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-68xw-r643-9p5w", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53845", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-skill-command-dispatch-hook-bypass-via-before-tool-call-hook-skipping", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r7vv-6763-m739"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: Skill-command dispatch could skip before-tool-call hooks", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T20:15:50Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-r7vv-6763-m739", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.5.5"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-18T20:15:49Z"}
